name: Chocolate-Coconut Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In the top of a double boiler over simmering water, heat the milk and chocolate until the chocolate melts.
2. Remove from heat; stir in the remaining ingredients.
3. Drop by level teaspoonfuls about 1-1/2 inches apart on heavily greased cookie sheets.
4. Bake in a preheated oven at 300 degrees for 15 minutes or until slightly firm and dry to touch.
